# Denny Pratama

> UI/UX designer and developer based in Indonesia. I build digital products where aesthetics and function refuse to compromise — bridging visual craft and technical execution for startups and founders. Available for new projects.

## Main

- [Home](https://dennypratama.com): Portfolio, selected work, services, and about.
- [Blog](https://dennypratama.com/blog): Articles on UI/UX design, web development, and AI tools for designers and developers. Each post is linked from this page.

## About

- Name: Denny Pratama
- Role: UI/UX Designer & Developer
- Location: Indonesia
- Focus: UI/UX design, web development, brand identity, design systems, AI
- Contact: hello@dennypratama.com
